Babar Azam Ends Century, Mimics Kohli’s Iconic Celebration

Nov 15, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Babar Azam Ends Century, Mimics Kohli’s Iconic Celebration

Pakistan captain Babar Azam reached a stellar century and marked it by performing Virat Kohli’s iconic celebration, triggering social media buzz and comparisons between cricketing generations.
